basic_details.job_title: IIT Ropar Project Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Indian Institute of Technology Ropar (IIT Ropar)
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Technology Ropar (IIT Ropar) has released an official notification for the recruitment of 1 Project Assistant Posts. Interested and eligible candidates can apply by sending their application via Email. The last date to send the application email is 06-07-2026. In this article, you'll find the Project Assistant recruitment details, including eligibility criteria, age limit, salary structure, selection process, email application procedure, and direct links to the official notification.

age_limit.details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

qualification.education_qualification: B.Tech/B.Sc. in Chemical Engineering/ Environmental Engineering/ Chemistry/ Bio-technology or a relevant discipline.
qualification.details: B.Tech/B.Sc. in Chemical Engineering/ Environmental Engineering/ Chemistry/ Bio-technology or a relevant discipline.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for IIT Ropar Project Assistant Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 06-07-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for IIT Ropar Project Assistant Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience. Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs. Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email. Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification. Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 06-07-2026. Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: IIT Ropar Project Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IIT Ropar Project Assistant recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email for the IIT Ropar Project Assistant position is 06-07-2026. Ensure your application reaches the concerned authority before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Project Assistant post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a B.Tech/B.Sc. degree in Chemical Engineering, Environmental Engineering, Chemistry, Bio-technology, or a related field to be eligible for this position.

faq.question: Q3. What is the salary offered for the Project Assistant role?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 20,000 per month, along with House Rent Allowance (HRA).

faq.question: Q4. How can I apply for the IIT Ropar Project Assistant job?
faq.answer: Applications are to be submitted via email. You need to prepare your bio-data, attach necessary documents, and send it to the official email address specified in the notification before the last date.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee required for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for the Project Assistant position?
faq.answer: The selection process will involve an interview, which can be conducted either online or offline, depending on the institute's arrangements.

faq.question: Q7. How many vacancies are available for the Project Assistant post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Project Assistant position at IIT Ropar.

faq.question: Q8. What is the job type for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The position of Project Assistant is on a contractual basis.

faq.question: Q9. Where is IIT Ropar located?
faq.answer: Indian Institute of Technology Ropar is located in Rupnagar, Punjab, with the pincode 140001.

faq.question: Q10. Can I apply offline for this position?
faq.answer: No, the application mode for this recruitment is strictly via email. Offline applications will not be considered.
